html:
Exclusive to:

Volt Goat Chaud-Froid is a Warly-specific Food Item cooked in the Portable Crock Pot, exclusive to Don't Starve Together. It requires a Volt Goat Horn and two Sweeteners, and takes 40 seconds to cook.

Consuming Volt Goat Chaud-Froid turns all damage caused by the player to electrical damage for five minutes. This grants a damage boost of x1.5 (x2.5 when target is wet).

Contents

  • 1 Recipe
  • 2 Examples
  • 3 Tips
  • 4 Trivia

Recipe

x2.0

Filler cannot be Meats.

Examples

×2

×2

×2

×2

Tips

  • Volt Goat Chaud-Froid can be a useful food when fighting off Depths Worm attacks in the Caves, because of the x2.5 damage multiplier against wet mobs.
  • Being a crock pot dish, it can be seasoned with Chili Flakes to deal an additional x1.2 damage multiplier. This comes to a total x3 damage multiplier against wet mobs. (x1.8 damage multiplier for dry mobs)
  • Damage dealt while riding a Beefalo is affected by the damage multiplier from Volt Goat Chaud-Froid.
  • Volt Goat Chaud-Froid, due to being a goodie item, can be eaten by Wigfrid despite its lack of meat.

Trivia

  • Chaud-Froid, also know as Aspic, is a savory gelatin made from broth or meat stock.
  • Characters' quotes when the electric buff starts:
  • Characters' quotes when the electric buff ends:
  • Webber's quote for the electric buff starting is most likely a reference to the famous line in Spider-Man, "With great power comes great responsibility".
  • Maxwell's quote for the electric buff starting might be a reference to Emperor Palpatine's same line from Star Wars: Episode III - Revenge of the Sith.


By TypeBy Crock Pot Value

"voltgoatjelly"
“It's shockingly delicious.”
–Wilson
“HEY WARLY! Can I eat this?”
–Willow
“Is look very nice, tasty-making friend!”
–Wolfgang
“It zaps your tongue.”
–Wendy
“THIS IS THE MOST SUPERIOR FOOD”
–WX-78
“His ingenuity with limited materials is very impressive.”
–Wickerbottom
“Can't remember the last time I had dessert.”
–Woodie
“Just because I'm old doesn't mean I like gelatin.”
–Maxwell
“Well, it is technically made fröm a beast.”
–Wigfrid
“WOW! Gelatin!”
–Webber
“I ground the horns up myself.”
–Warly
“Friend made. With Love”
–Wormwood
“You can really taste the electricity.”
–Winona
“Hyuyu, it looks interesting at least.”
–Wortox
“Ooooooh, it jiggly!”
–Wurt
“It definitely has a zing to it.”
–Walter
“Oooh, what a fashionable flummery!”
–Wanda
Volt Goat Chaud-Froid is a Warly-specific Food Item cooked in the Portable Crock Pot, exclusive to Don't Starve Together. It requires a Volt Goat Horn and two Sweeteners, and takes 40 seconds to cook.
Consuming Volt Goat Chaud-Froid turns all damage caused by the player to electrical damage for five minutes. This grants a damage boost of x1.5 (x2.5 when target is wet).

Filler cannot be Meats.
Examples[edit | edit source]
×2
×2
×2
×2
Tips[edit | edit source]
Volt Goat Chaud-Froid can be a useful food when fighting off Depths Worm attacks in the Caves, because of the x2.5 damage multiplier against wet mobs.
Being a crock pot dish, it can be seasoned with Chili Flakes to deal an additional x1.2 damage multiplier. This comes to a total x3 damage multiplier against wet mobs. (x1.8 damage multiplier for dry mobs)
Damage dealt while riding a Beefalo is affected by the damage multiplier from Volt Goat Chaud-Froid.
Volt Goat Chaud-Froid, due to being a goodie item, can be eaten by Wigfrid despite its lack of meat.
Trivia[edit | edit source]
Chaud-Froid, also know as Aspic, is a savory gelatin made from broth or meat stock.
Characters' quotes when the electric buff starts:
“I feel positively electric!”
–Wilson
“I've never tried using electricity to start fires!”
–Willow
“Sparky! I like!”
–Wolfgang
“I feel the thrill of power!”
–Wendy
“ELECTRICAL CIRCUITS OVERLOADING”
–WX-78
“I seem to have been rendered conductive!”
–Wickerbottom
“Careful you don't get zapped, eh!”
–Woodie
“Unlimited power!”
–Maxwell
“I've been granted the pöwer of Thör!”
–Wigfrid
“With great lightning powers comes great responsibility!”
–Webber
“I'll zap you to a nice, even crisp!”
–Warly
“Zap! Zap, Zap!”
–Wormwood
“I ain't no electrician, but what the heck!”
–Winona
“I'm an electric imp!”
–Wortox
“Sparky!!”
–Wurt
“This reminds me of a radio program I heard where a guy was hit by lightning and turned into pure electricity and-”
–Walter
“I've never felt so full of energy!”
–Wanda
Characters' quotes when the electric buff ends:
“The electricity's gone, but the static clings.”
–Wilson
“I like setting fires the old fashioned way, anyhow.”
–Willow
“Lightning magic gone.”
–Wolfgang
“The storm has passed.”
–Wendy
“POWER LEVELS NORMALIZED”
–WX-78
“Back to the the natural state of things.”
–Wickerbottom
“Power's out, eh?”
–Woodie
“Shame. I was starting to enjoy that.”
–Maxwell
“I... suppöse I was unwörthy.”
–Wigfrid
“Aww, done already?”
–Webber
“Oh well, I prefer natural gas over electric anyway.”
–Warly
“Aww. No more zaps.”
–Wormwood
“I'm all outta juice!”
–Winona
“I think I gave them quite a shock! Hyuyu!”
–Wortox
“Awwwwww...”
–Wurt
“Darnit... guess the show's over.”
–Walter
“I'll miss having electricity at my fingertips.”
–Wanda
Webber's quote for the electric buff starting is most likely a reference to the famous line in Spider-Man, "With great power comes great responsibility".
Maxwell's quote for the electric buff starting might be a reference to Emperor Palpatine's same line from Star Wars: Episode III - Revenge of the Sith.

summaryViHtml:
Tóm tắt

Volt Goat Chaud-Froid là một Thức Ăn đặc trưng của Warly được nấu trong Nồi Hầm Di Động, độc quyền cho Don't Starve Together. Nó yêu cầu một chiếc sừng dê Volt và hai chất làm ngọt và mất 40 giây để nấu.
title: Volt Goat Chaud-Froid

'''Volt Goat Chaud-Froid''' is a [[Warly]]-specific [[Food]] [[Item]] cooked in the [[Portable Crock Pot]], exclusive to ''[[Don't Starve Together]]''. It requires a [[Volt Goat Horn]] and two [[Sweetener]]s, and takes 40 seconds to cook.

Consuming Volt Goat Chaud-Froid turns all damage caused by the player to electrical damage for five minutes. This grants a damage boost of x1.5 (x2.5 when target is [[Wetness|wet]]).

=={{Pic32|Cookbook}} Recipe==
{{Recipe
|item1 = Volt Goat Horn
|item2 = Sweetener
|count2 = 2.0
|comparator2 = x
|item3 = Filler
|tool = Portable Crock Pot
|result = Volt Goat Chaud-Froid
|note = Filler cannot be [[Meats]].
}}

== Examples ==
{{Recipe
|item1=Volt Goat Horn
|item2=Honey
|count2=2
|item3=Twigs
|tool = Portable Crock Pot
|result = Volt Goat Chaud-Froid}}
{{Recipe
|item1=Volt Goat Horn
|item2=Honey
|count2=2
|item3=Berries
|tool = Portable Crock Pot
|result = Volt Goat Chaud-Froid}}
{{Recipe
|item1=Volt Goat Horn
|item2=Honey
|count2=2
|item3=Red Cap
|tool = Portable Crock Pot
|result = Volt Goat Chaud-Froid}}
{{Recipe
|item1=Volt Goat Horn
|item2=Royal Jelly
|item3=Ice
|count3=2
|tool = Portable Crock Pot
|result = Volt Goat Chaud-Froid}}

== {{pic|32|Prototype}} Tips ==
* Volt Goat Chaud-Froid can be a useful food when fighting off [[Depths Worm]] attacks in the [[Caves]], because of the x2.5 damage multiplier against wet mobs.
* Being a crock pot dish, it can be seasoned with [[Chili Flakes]] to deal an additional x1.2 damage multiplier. This comes to a total x3 damage multiplier against wet mobs. (x1.8 damage multiplier for dry mobs)
*Damage dealt while riding a [[Beefalo]] is affected by the damage multiplier from Volt Goat Chaud-Froid.
* Volt Goat Chaud-Froid, due to being a goodie item, can be eaten by Wigfrid despite its lack of meat.

== {{pic|32|Placeholder}} Trivia ==
* Chaud-Froid, also know as Aspic, is a savory gelatin made from broth or meat stock.
